institution.name: University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences are 70% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($73.8k vs $43.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences rose 47% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.6k).
